member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Interfaces.IImageManagementService
member.summary: Interface for Hyper-V Image Management Service operations Manages virtual media (.vhd, .vhdx, .iso, .vfd files) for virtual machines

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Interfaces.IJobService
member.summary: Interface for managing storage jobs

member.name: M:HyperV.Contracts.Interfaces.IJobService.GetStorageJobsAsync
member.summary: Gets list of all storage jobs

member.name: M:HyperV.Contracts.Interfaces.IJobService.GetStorageJobAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Gets details of a specific storage job

member.name: M:HyperV.Contracts.Interfaces.IJobService.GetJobAffectedElementsAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Gets elements affected by a storage job

member.name: M:HyperV.Contracts.Interfaces.IJobService.CancelStorageJobAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Cancels a storage job

member.name: M:HyperV.Contracts.Interfaces.IJobService.DeleteStorageJobAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Deletes a completed job

member.name: M:HyperV.Contracts.Interfaces.IStorageService.ListStorageDevicesAsync
member.summary: Lists all fixed storage devices with details.

member.name: M:HyperV.Contracts.Interfaces.IStorageService.GetSuitableVhdLocationsAsync(System.Int64)
member.summary: Gets suitable locations for VHDX storage based on free space.

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VmCloneType
member.summary: Clone type for VM cloning operations.

member.name: F:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VmCloneType.Full
member.summary: Full clone - complete copy of the VM with independent disks.

member.name: F:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VmCloneType.Linked
member.summary: Linked clone - shares base disks with parent VM, uses differencing disks.

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CloneVmRequest
member.summary: Request model for cloning a VM.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CloneVmRequest.SourceVmName
member.summary: Source VM name to clone from.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CloneVmRequest.NewVmName
member.summary: Name for the new cloned VM.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CloneVmRequest.CloneType
member.summary: Type of clone to create.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CloneVmRequest.NewMemoryMB
member.summary: Optional new memory allocation in MB (overrides source VM memory).

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CloneVmRequest.NewCpuCount
member.summary: Optional new CPU count (overrides source VM CPU count).

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CloneVmRequest.NewDiskSizeGB
member.summary: Optional new disk size in GB (for full clones, expands the copied disk).

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CloneVmRequest.NewVhdPath
member.summary: Optional new VHD path for the cloned VM.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CloneVmRequest.NewSwitchName
member.summary: Optional new network switch name.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CloneVmRequest.Notes
member.summary: Optional notes for the cloned VM.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CloneVmRequest.StartAfterClone
member.summary: Whether to start the cloned VM after creation.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CloneVmRequest.PreferredBackend
member.summary: Preferred backend for the cloned VM.

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CloneVmResponse
member.summary: Response model for clone operations.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CloneVmResponse.ClonedVmName
member.summary: Name of the cloned VM.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CloneVmResponse.CloneType
member.summary: Clone type used.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CloneVmResponse.Backend
member.summary: Backend used for cloning.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CloneVmResponse.Started
member.summary: Whether the clone was started automatically.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CloneVmResponse.CompletedAt
member.summary: Timestamp of clone completion.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CloneVmResponse.Details
member.summary: Additional information about the clone operation.

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.ConvertVhdRequest
member.summary: Request model for converting virtual hard disk formats

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.ConvertVhdRequest.SourcePath
member.summary: Path to the source virtual hard disk file

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.ConvertVhdRequest.DestinationPath
member.summary: Path where the converted virtual hard disk will be created

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.ConvertVhdRequest.TargetFormat
member.summary: Target format for conversion (VHD, VHDX)

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.ConvertVhdRequest.DiskType
member.summary: Type of virtual disk (Fixed, Dynamic, Differencing)

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.ConvertVhdRequest.BlockSize
member.summary: Block size for the converted disk (optional)

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.ConvertVhdRequest.OverwriteDestination
member.summary: Whether to overwrite existing destination file

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskFormat
member.summary: Virtual disk format enumeration

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskType
member.summary: Virtual disk type enumeration

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.ContainerCreationMode
member.summary: Container creation mode - HCS or WMI.

member.name: F:HyperV.Contracts.Models.ContainerCreationMode.HCS
member.summary: Host Compute System API (lightweight containers).

member.name: F:HyperV.Contracts.Models.ContainerCreationMode.WMI
member.summary: Windows Management Instrumentation API (Hyper-V containers).

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateContainerRequest
member.summary: Request to create a new Hyper-V container.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateContainerRequest.Id
member.summary: Unique container ID (UUID or friendly name).

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateContainerRequest.Name
member.summary: Container name visible in management tools.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateContainerRequest.MemoryMB
member.summary: Memory limit in MB.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateContainerRequest.CpuCount
member.summary: CPU limit (number of cores).

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateContainerRequest.StorageSizeGB
member.summary: Storage size in GB (for persistent containers).

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateContainerRequest.Image
member.summary: Container image or base OS.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateContainerRequest.Mode
member.summary: Container creation mode - HCS (lightweight) or WMI (Hyper-V isolated).

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateContainerRequest.Environment
member.summary: Environment variables for the container.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateContainerRequest.PortMappings
member.summary: Port mappings for the container.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateContainerRequest.VolumeMounts
member.summary: Volume mounts for the container.

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmFromTemplateRequest
member.summary: Request model for creating VM from template.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmFromTemplateRequest.Id
member.summary: Unikalny identyfikator VM (UUID lub friendly name).

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmFromTemplateRequest.Name
member.summary: Nazwa VM widoczna w menedżerze Hyper-V.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmFromTemplateRequest.Template
member.summary: Template type to use for VM creation.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmFromTemplateRequest.MemoryMB
member.summary: Optional custom memory in MB (overrides template default).

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmFromTemplateRequest.CpuCount
member.summary: Optional custom CPU count (overrides template default).

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmFromTemplateRequest.DiskSizeGB
member.summary: Optional custom disk size in GB (overrides template default).

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmFromTemplateRequest.Generation
member.summary: Optional custom generation (overrides template default).

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmFromTemplateRequest.SecureBoot
member.summary: Optional custom secure boot setting (overrides template default).

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmFromTemplateRequest.VhdPath
member.summary: Ścieżka do pliku VHD/VHDX. Jeśli nie podano, zostanie utworzona automatycznie.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmFromTemplateRequest.SwitchName
member.summary: Nazwa przełącznika sieciowego do podłączenia VM.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmFromTemplateRequest.Notes
member.summary: Notatki/opis VM.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmFromTemplateRequest.PreferredBackend
member.summary: Preferred backend (auto-selected if not specified).

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VmCreationMode
member.summary: Tryb tworzenia VM - HCS lub WMI.

member.name: F:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VmCreationMode.HCS
member.summary: Host Compute System API (kontener-like, nie widoczny w Hyper-V Manager).

member.name: F:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VmCreationMode.WMI
member.summary: Windows Management Instrumentation API (pełna VM widoczna w Hyper-V Manager).

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmRequest
member.summary: Żądanie utworzenia nowej maszyny wirtualnej Hyper-V.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmRequest.Id
member.summary: Unikalny identyfikator VM (UUID lub friendly name).

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmRequest.Name
member.summary: Nazwa VM widoczna w menedżerze Hyper-V.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmRequest.MemoryMB
member.summary: Pamięć RAM w MB.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmRequest.CpuCount
member.summary: Liczba CPU vCore.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmRequest.DiskSizeGB
member.summary: Rozmiar dysku w GB.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmRequest.Mode
member.summary: Tryb tworzenia VM - HCS (kontener-like) lub WMI (pełna VM).

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmRequest.Generation
member.summary: Generacja VM (1 lub 2). Domyślnie 2.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmRequest.SecureBoot
member.summary: Czy włączyć Secure Boot (tylko dla Generation 2).

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmRequest.VhdPath
member.summary: Ścieżka do pliku VHD/VHDX. Jeśli nie podano, zostanie utworzona automatycznie.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmRequest.SwitchName
member.summary: Nazwa przełącznika sieciowego do podłączenia VM.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmRequest.Notes
member.summary: Notatki/opis VM.

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.DifferencingDiskRequest
member.summary: Request model for creating a differencing disk

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.DifferencingDiskRequest.ChildPath
member.summary: Path where the child (differencing) disk will be created

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.DifferencingDiskRequest.ParentPath
member.summary: Path to the parent disk

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.GetVirtualDiskChangesRequest
member.summary: Request model for getting virtual disk changes

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.GetVirtualDiskChangesRequest.VhdSetPath
member.summary: Path to the VHD Set file

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.GetVirtualDiskChangesRequest.ChangeTrackingId
member.summary: Change tracking identifier to query changes from

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.GetVirtualDiskChangesRequest.ByteOffset
member.summary: Byte offset to start querying changes from

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.GetVirtualDiskChangesRequest.ByteLength
member.summary: Number of bytes to query changes for

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.GetVirtualDiskChangesRequest.Flags
member.summary: Flags for the query operation

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskChangeFlags
member.summary: Flags for virtual disk change queries

member.name: F:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskChangeFlags.ChangedOnly
member.summary: Include only changed blocks

member.name: F:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskChangeFlags.IncludeMetadata
member.summary: Include metadata changes

member.name: F:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskChangeFlags.ResilientChangeTracking
member.summary: Use resilient change tracking

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.HostHardwareInfo
member.summary: Host hardware information.

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.SystemInfo
member.summary: System information (OS details).

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.PerformanceSummary
member.summary: Current performance summary.

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.RecentTask
member.summary: Recent task/job information.

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.MergeDiskRequest
member.summary: Request model for merging a differencing disk with its parent

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.MergeDiskRequest.ChildPath
member.summary: Path to the child (differencing) disk to merge

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.MergeDiskRequest.DestinationPath
member.summary: Path to the destination disk to merge into

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.MergeDiskRequest.MergeDepth
member.summary: Number of parent levels to merge (default: 1)

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.SetVhdSnapshotInfoRequest
member.summary: Request model for setting VHD snapshot information

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.SetVhdSnapshotInfoRequest.VhdSetPath
member.summary: Path to the VHD Set file

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.SetVhdSnapshotInfoRequest.SnapshotId
member.summary: Unique identifier of the snapshot

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.SetVhdSnapshotInfoRequest.Name
member.summary: New display name for the snapshot (optional)

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.SetVhdSnapshotInfoRequest.Description
member.summary: New description for the snapshot (optional)

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.SetVhdSnapshotInfoRequest.IsActive
member.summary: Whether to mark this snapshot as active (optional)

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.StorageDeviceResponse
member.summary: Response model for storage device information

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.StorageDeviceResponse.DeviceId
member.summary: Unique identifier for the storage device

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.StorageDeviceResponse.Name
member.summary: Display name of the storage device

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.StorageDeviceResponse.DeviceType
member.summary: Type of storage device (VirtualDisk, PhysicalDisk, DVD, Floppy)

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.StorageDeviceResponse.Path
member.summary: Path to the storage file (for virtual devices)

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.StorageDeviceResponse.ControllerId
member.summary: Controller the device is attached to

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.StorageDeviceResponse.ControllerType
member.summary: Controller type (IDE, SCSI)

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.StorageDeviceResponse.ControllerLocation
member.summary: Location on the controller (0, 1, etc.)

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.StorageDeviceResponse.IsReadOnly
member.summary: Whether the device is read-only

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.StorageDeviceResponse.OperationalStatus
member.summary: Current operational status

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.StorageDeviceResponse.Size
member.summary: Size of the storage device in bytes

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.StorageDeviceResponse.SupportsHotPlug
member.summary: Whether the device supports hot-plug operations

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.StorageControllerResponse
member.summary: Response model for storage controller information

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.StorageControllerResponse.ControllerId
member.summary: Unique identifier for the storage controller

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.StorageControllerResponse.Name
member.summary: Display name of the storage controller

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.StorageControllerResponse.ControllerType
member.summary: Type of storage controller (IDE, SCSI)

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.StorageControllerResponse.MaxDevices
member.summary: Maximum number of devices this controller can support

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.StorageControllerResponse.AttachedDevices
member.summary: Number of devices currently attached

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.StorageControllerResponse.AvailableLocations
member.summary: Available locations on the controller

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.StorageControllerResponse.SupportsHotPlug
member.summary: Whether the controller supports hot-plug operations

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.StorageControllerResponse.OperationalStatus
member.summary: Current operational status

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.StorageControllerResponse.Protocol
member.summary: Protocol supported by the controller

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.AddStorageDeviceRequest
member.summary: Request model for adding a storage device to a VM

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.AddStorageDeviceRequest.DeviceType
member.summary: Type of storage device to add

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.AddStorageDeviceRequest.Path
member.summary: Path to the storage file (for virtual devices)

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.AddStorageDeviceRequest.ControllerId
member.summary: Controller ID to attach the device to

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.AddStorageDeviceRequest.ControllerLocation
member.summary: Specific location on the controller (optional, auto-assign if not specified)

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.AddStorageDeviceRequest.ReadOnly
member.summary: Whether to attach as read-only

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.MountedStorageImageResponse
member.summary: Response model for mounted storage images

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.MountedStorageImageResponse.ImagePath
member.summary: Path to the mounted storage image

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.MountedStorageImageResponse.MountPath
member.summary: Physical path where the image is mounted

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.MountedStorageImageResponse.ImageType
member.summary: Type of storage image (VHD, VHDX, ISO, VFD)

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.MountedStorageImageResponse.IsReadOnly
member.summary: Whether the image is mounted read-only

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.MountedStorageImageResponse.VmName
member.summary: VM name if attached to a specific VM

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.MountedStorageImageResponse.Size
member.summary: Size of the mounted image in bytes

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.MountedStorageImageResponse.MountedAt
member.summary: When the image was mounted

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdCompactMode
member.summary: Specifies the mode for the VHD compact operation.

member.name: F:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdCompactMode.Full
member.summary: Frees unused blocks and reduces the file size.

member.name: F:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdCompactMode.Quick
member.summary: Frees unused blocks but does not reduce file size.

member.name: F:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdCompactMode.Retrim
member.summary: Scans for unmapped blocks and reclaims them.

member.name: F:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdCompactMode.Pretrimmed
member.summary: For use after the disk has been trimmed.

member.name: F:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdCompactMode.Prezeroed
member.summary: For use after the disk has been zeroed.

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CompactVhdRequest
member.summary: Request model for compacting a virtual hard disk.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CompactVhdRequest.Path
member.summary: A fully qualified path that specifies the location of the VHD file.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CompactVhdRequest.Mode
member.summary: The mode for the compact operation.

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.StorageDeviceInfo
member.summary: Information about a storage device (drive).

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.StorageLocation
member.summary: Suggested location for VHDX storage on a drive.

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVfdRequest
member.summary: Request model for creating virtual floppy disks

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVfdRequest.Path
member.summary: Path where the VFD file will be created

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVfdRequest.Size
member.summary: Size of the floppy disk (default: 1.44MB)

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVfdRequest.Format
member.summary: Whether to format the floppy disk

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVfdRequest.FileSystem
member.summary: File system to use (FAT12 for floppies)

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVfdRequest.VolumeLabel
member.summary: Volume label for the floppy disk

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VfdSize
member.summary: Supported virtual floppy disk sizes

member.name: F:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VfdSize.Floppy144MB
member.summary: 1.44 MB floppy disk (standard)

member.name: F:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VfdSize.Floppy12MB
member.summary: 1.2 MB floppy disk

member.name: F:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VfdSize.Floppy720KB
member.summary: 720 KB floppy disk

member.name: F:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VfdSize.Floppy360KB
member.summary: 360 KB floppy disk

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VfdAttachRequest
member.summary: Request model for attaching/detaching VFD to/from VM

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VfdAttachRequest.VmName
member.summary: Name of the VM

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VfdAttachRequest.VfdPath
member.summary: Path to the VFD file

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VfdAttachRequest.ReadOnly
member.summary: Whether to attach as read-only

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdMetadata
member.summary: Represents comprehensive metadata information about a VHD file

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdMetadata.Path
member.summary: Full path to the VHD file

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdMetadata.Format
member.summary: VHD format (VHD or VHDX)

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdMetadata.Size
member.summary: Physical size of the VHD file on disk (in bytes)

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdMetadata.VirtualSize
member.summary: Virtual size of the VHD (maximum capacity in bytes)

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdMetadata.ParentPath
member.summary: Path to parent VHD (for differencing disks)

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdMetadata.UniqueId
member.summary: Unique identifier of the VHD

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdMetadata.IsAttached
member.summary: Whether the VHD is currently attached to the system

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdMetadata.PhysicalSectorSize
member.summary: Physical sector size in bytes

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdMetadata.IsDifferencingDisk
member.summary: Whether this is a differencing disk

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdMetadata.CompressionRatio
member.summary: Compression ratio (physical size / virtual size)

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdMetadata.CreatedAt
member.summary: Creation timestamp (if available)

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdMetadata.ModifiedAt
member.summary: Last modified timestamp (if available)

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdMetadataUpdate
member.summary: Represents updates to VHD metadata

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdMetadataUpdate.NewUniqueId
member.summary: New unique identifier for the VHD

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdMetadataUpdate.NewParentPath
member.summary: New parent path for differencing disks

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdMetadataUpdate.NewPhysicalSectorSize
member.summary: New physical sector size

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdSetInformationResponse
member.summary: Response model containing VHD Set information

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdSetInformationResponse.Path
member.summary: Path to the VHD Set file

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdSetInformationResponse.VirtualSize
member.summary: Virtual size of the VHD Set in bytes

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdSetInformationResponse.PhysicalSize
member.summary: Physical size of the VHD Set in bytes

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdSetInformationResponse.BlockSize
member.summary: Block size of the VHD Set

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdSetInformationResponse.LogicalSectorSize
member.summary: Logical sector size

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdSetInformationResponse.PhysicalSectorSize
member.summary: Physical sector size

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdSetInformationResponse.CreationTime
member.summary: Creation timestamp of the VHD Set

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdSetInformationResponse.LastModified
member.summary: Last modification timestamp

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdSetInformationResponse.Identifier
member.summary: Unique identifier of the VHD Set

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdSetInformationResponse.Snapshots
member.summary: List of snapshots in the VHD Set

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdSetInformationResponse.IsMounted
member.summary: Whether the VHD Set is currently mounted

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdSetInformationResponse.SupportsResilientChangeTracking
member.summary: Whether the VHD Set supports resilient change tracking

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdSnapshotInfo
member.summary: Information about a VHD snapshot

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdSnapshotInfo.SnapshotId
member.summary: Unique identifier of the snapshot

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdSnapshotInfo.Name
member.summary: Display name of the snapshot

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdSnapshotInfo.Description
member.summary: Description of the snapshot

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdSnapshotInfo.CreationTime
member.summary: Creation timestamp of the snapshot

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdSnapshotInfo.ParentSnapshotId
member.summary: Parent snapshot identifier (if any)

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdSnapshotInfo.IsActive
member.summary: Whether this is the active snapshot

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdSnapshotInformationResponse
member.summary: Response model containing VHD snapshot information

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdSnapshotInformationResponse.SnapshotId
member.summary: Unique identifier of the snapshot

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdSnapshotInformationResponse.Name
member.summary: Display name of the snapshot

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdSnapshotInformationResponse.Description
member.summary: Description of the snapshot

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdSnapshotInformationResponse.CreationTime
member.summary: Creation timestamp of the snapshot

member.summary: Parent snapshot identifier (if any)

member.summary: Whether this is the active snapshot

member.summary: Physical size of the snapshot in bytes

member.summary: Whether the snapshot supports resilient change tracking

member.summary: Path to the VHD file to validate

member.summary: Whether to perform deep validation (slower but more thorough)

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdValidationRequest.ValidateParentChain
member.summary: Whether to check parent chain for differencing disks

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdValidationRequest.ValidatePersistentReservation
member.summary: Whether to validate persistent reservation support

member.summary: Response model for VHD validation results

member.summary: Path to the validated VHD file

member.summary: Whether the VHD is valid

member.summary: List of validation errors found

member.summary: List of validation warnings

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdValidationResponse.ParentChainValid
member.summary: Whether parent chain is valid (for differencing disks)

member.summary: Whether persistent reservation is supported

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VhdValidationResponse.ValidatedAt
member.summary: Validation completion time

member.summary: Response model containing virtual disk changes information

member.summary: List of changed disk ranges

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskChangesResponse.TotalChangedBytes
member.summary: Total number of changed bytes

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskChangesResponse.HasMoreChanges
member.summary: Whether more changes are available beyond this response

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskChangesResponse.NextChangeTrackingId
member.summary: Next change tracking identifier for subsequent queries

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskChangesResponse.CaptureTime
member.summary: Timestamp when the changes were captured

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskChangeRange
member.summary: Represents a range of changed bytes in a virtual disk

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskChangeRange.ByteOffset
member.summary: Starting byte offset of the changed range

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskChangeRange.ByteLength
member.summary: Length of the changed range in bytes

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskChangeRange.ChangeType
member.summary: Type of change that occurred

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskChangeType
member.summary: Types of changes that can occur in a virtual disk

member.name: F:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskChangeType.DataWritten
member.summary: Data was written to this range

member.name: F:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskChangeType.DataDeallocated
member.summary: Data was deallocated from this range

member.name: F:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskChangeType.MetadataChanged
member.summary: Metadata was changed for this range

member.name: F:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskChangeType.DataZeroed
member.summary: Range was zeroed

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskProgress
member.summary: Represents progress information for virtual disk operations

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskProgress.OperationStatus
member.summary: Current operation status (0 = success, non-zero = error)

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskProgress.CurrentValue
member.summary: Current progress value

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskProgress.CompletionValue
member.summary: Total completion value (when CurrentValue equals this, operation is complete)

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskProgress.PercentComplete
member.summary: Progress percentage (0-100)

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskProgress.IsComplete
member.summary: Whether the operation is complete

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VirtualDiskProgress.HasError
member.summary: Whether the operation has an error

member.summary: Interface for FibreChannel service operations.

member.summary: Creates a SAN pool.
member.param: The name of the SAN pool.

member.summary: Deletes a SAN pool.
member.param: The ID of the SAN pool.

member.summary: Gets information about a SAN pool.

member.param: The ID of the SAN pool.
